hyperedges.label: Phase-1 Hybrid: LangGraph Stays on Mongo
Postgres shared helpers (id/errors/tx) threaded through all PG repos
Dual-driver parity: contract harness runs PG repos against Mongo behavioral truth
V2 conformance suite: world tools + judge + harness indirection
